repositories.name: Rugby7-Referee-Fatigue-Analyzer
repositories.description: Open-source scientific software for analysing subjective fatigue and match demands in Rugby Sevens referees.

repositories.name: SportsLabResearch-rugby7-referee-spatial-analysis
repositories.description: Open-source software for the spatial analysis of Rugby Sevens referees using GNSS data.

repositories.name: SportsLabResearch-BreastCancer-Wellbeing-Analyzer
repositories.description: Scientific software for multidimensional assessment and longitudinal monitoring of wellbeing in women with breast cancer. Integrates patient-reported outcomes, blood pressure, SpO₂ and clinical indicators to generate automated dashboards and scientific reports. Adaptable to other clinical populations.

repositories.name: SportsLabResearch-BloodPressure-Analyzer
repositories.description: Open-source research software for resting blood pressure analysis, longitudinal monitoring and automated clinical reporting based on ESH 2023 recommendations.

repositories.name: SportsLabResearch-WIMU-DataExtractor
repositories.description: Open-source extractor for WIMU .QUL and .QUI files with native Excel export.

repositories.name: SportsLabResearch
repositories.description: International platform for scientific software, research technology and open innovation in sport science, exercise and health.

repositories.name: HRV-Longitudinal-Analyzer
repositories.description: A professional cross-platform application for longitudinal Heart Rate Variability (HRV) analysis, featuring Kubios data import, automated scientific reporting, advanced statistical analysis, participant management, and interactive dashboards for research, sports science, and clinical monitoring.

repositories.name: .github
